title: Board game session record (core)
description: Cross-game fields. Validated against every record in addition to the base + variant schemas for the game.

game.description: Lowercase hyphenated slug of the printed title, e.g. 'catan', 'the-king-is-dead'. Never carries a year — use year_published for that.

variants.description: Zero or more expansion/edition slugs active in this session. Each must have a corresponding <slug>.schema.json in the game folder. The validator unions the base and listed variant schemas to get the allowed end_state keys.

year_published.description: Original publication year of the game. Pure metadata when the title is unique; also the tiebreaker (and folder selector) when two games share a printed title.

player_count.description: Number of seated players. Must equal len(players).

winners.description: Indices into players[] of the winner(s). Multiple entries = tie or team win.

notes.description: Free-form prose for details the structured fields don't capture.

players.description: One entry per player, in seating order. Position in array = player index.

name.description: Player's name/handle. Non-unique is fine; winners references by index.

email.description: Optional stable identifier for the player across sessions. Used for aggregations and stats over time.

identity.description: Colour / faction / civ / mat / role. Base + variant schemas may constrain via enum; the validator unions their enums.

team.description: Team number for team games. Teammates share the value.

eliminated.description: Whether the player was knocked out before the game ended. Omit for games without elimination.

end_state.description: Map of everything the player holds at game end. Values are integers for counts, booleans for flags (e.g. longest_road). Keys and per-key types are constrained by the union of the base schema and any listed variant schemas.
